BucketItem.title: Bucket Item
BucketItem.description: An item on the shared bucket list.

text.description: The description of the bucket list item.

completed.description: Whether the item has been checked off.

createdBy.description: The UID of the user who added the item.

createdByName.description: The display name of the user who added the item.

completedBy.description: The UID of the user who completed the item.

completedByName.description: The display name of the user who completed the item.

Comment.title: Comment
Comment.description: A comment on a bucket list item.

createdBy.description: The UID of the user who wrote the comment.

createdByName.description: The display name of the user who wrote the comment.

/bucketItems/{itemId}.description: Collection of shared bucket list items.

/bucketItems/{itemId}/comments/{commentI.description: Subcollection of comments for a bucket list item.
